definition:
1. a gathering, collecting , (Thucydides): metaphorically, ἐν γενείου ξυλλογῇ τριχώματος in the first harvest  of a beard, i. e. in early manhood, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
2. a levying  of soldiers, Lat. conscriptio, (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. a summary, recapitulation , (Demosthenes Orator) 
4. (from Pass.) an assembly, meeting , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
